ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot reacting to a red circle, perhaps representing a warning or stop signal.  The sequence will start with arms at rest, then move to a defensive position with arms slightly raised and angled outward, followed by a pause, and finally a return to the resting position. The movement should convey a sense of caution and alertness, reflecting the visual impact of the red circle. The use of slight perturbations adds a natural feel, avoiding rigidity.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, neutral state
arms lift slightly, a cautious outward angle
arms raise further, alert and ready
arms retract slightly, a moment of consideration
arms return to resting position, the signal fades
